features.name: Clinical Case Application Shell
features.description: The main app entry point and navigation scaffolding — study browser tree, study list widget, and domain-level exploration for SDTM/SEND datasets.
features.evidence_summary: Three functions share the 'app', 'appTreeBrowser', and study-list-widget roles, all tied to the top-level 'Clinical Case' app name and its initial-view changelog entries.

features.name: SDTM/SEND Data Import
features.description: Loads clinical and preclinical study datasets from XPT files and SDTM/SEND folders, including SAS file reading and define.xml column metadata extraction.
features.evidence_summary: folderViewer + fileHandler (ext=xpt) + ReadSas script all converge on loading SDTM/SEND study data; changelog entries add XPT handler, directory selection, import view, and define.xml parsing.

features.name: CDISC CORE Validation
features.description: Runs the CDISC CORE engine against loaded datasets to surface rule violations, with an inline cell renderer for displaying and toggling validation errors.
features.evidence_summary: Run CDISC CORE Validation + sdiscRuleViolationRenderer share the 'CDISC/sdisc' name root and are corroborated by two 1.4.0 changelog entries about CDISC engine and validation-error visibility.

features.name: Adverse Events Analysis
features.description: Provides an adverse events browser, summary tables, and AE risk-assessment scatter plots for reviewing safety signals across subjects.
features.evidence_summary: Two changelog entries explicitly name adverse events browser/summary and AE Risk Assessment scatter plot; no dedicated function or script is registered (likely implemented inline in the app view).

features.name: Laboratory Results Analysis
features.description: Summarises lab test results with Hy's law plots, baseline-vs-endpoint comparisons, and boxplots to support safety and efficacy review.
features.evidence_summary: Changelog entry 1.0.5 explicitly lists lab results summary, Hy's law plot, baseline/endpoint plot, and boxplots as a distinct capability group.

features.name: Survival Analysis (Kaplan-Meier)
features.description: Generates Kaplan-Meier survival curves and runs covariate regression to quantify time-to-event outcomes in clinical and preclinical studies.
features.evidence_summary: survivalPlot (R) and covariates (R) scripts correspond directly to the '1.0.5: Kaplan-Meier curves and covariates analysis' changelog entry, forming a tightly coupled survival-analysis cluster.

features.name: Biomarkers Analysis
features.description: Visualises biomarker distributions and pairwise correlation matrices to support translational and pharmacodynamic data review.
features.evidence_summary: Two adjacent 1.0.5 changelog entries cover biomarker distributions and correlation matrices, signalling a deliberate biomarker analytics section in the app.

features.name: Subject Profiling and Timelines
features.description: Displays an individual subject's clinical profile and renders all subject events as an interactive timeline to support patient-level safety review.
features.evidence_summary: 1.0.5 changelog groups 'subjects events flow in time' and 'individual subject's profile' together; 1.0.6 fixes a timelines-viewer regression confirming this is a distinct navigable view.
